name: human-resources
description: Per-client HR department in a plugin — a brand-agnostic team of skills and agents covering the full HR lifecycle: recruitment, onboarding, compensation & benefits, performance management, training, employee & labor relations, legal compliance, policy/handbook development, health-safety-wellness, DEI, employee records/HRIS, scheduling, workforce strategy, and offboarding. Produces review-ready drafts and reports into the client project — never final legal advice, never sends anything, never touches live employee systems without explicit action.
